raw_trace.note: Full eprintln output from decode-one run, including [model-load], [full-model] per-layer, [phase], [OPT-0006-T2], and JSON summary. Reproducible from the frozen artifact and the committed binary.

operation_family_ledger.note: Per-projection timing not instrumented. Available: per-layer graph_us + eval_us totals only. Projection families cannot be separated from attention, normalization, activation, and KV overhead within each layer.

decode_peak.per_layer_rss_range_bytes: 6.7 GB down to ~15 MB during prefill; ~16 MB during decode

conclusion: All 1180 model tensors were bound as mapped external arrays. No application-level weight copy was recorded during model load.

Physical residency behavior remains unresolved: page-fault sampling is disabled (SIGBUS on macOS 26.x), and per-layer RSS values show an implausible drop from 6.7 GB to ~15 MB during prefill. If the drop is real (OS reclaiming MAP_PRIVATE file-backed pages under Metal memory pressure), it indicates severe memory contention rather than comfortable residency.

MLX active memory reaches 13.7 GB on a 16 GB machine. MLX active/peak/cache are allocator-specific measures; they are not equivalent to process RSS or total physical footprint. The model operates close to the machine envelope.
Residency optimization is not authorized until page-fault sampling is operational and a valid per-layer RSS series can be collected.

t2_probe.reason: External array dtype mismatch — Uint8 external arrays report as Uint32 through MLX Metal path on Apple Silicon. Copy comparison could not execute.

conclusion: Decode bottleneck confirmed: eval_us (Metal kernel execution + synchronization fence) dominates at 74.7% of wall time (28.63s of 38.30s).
Graph construction (lazy MLX operation recording) accounts for 16.2% (6.19s).
Decode per-layer mean: 797.9 ms wall, 725.4 ms accounted (129.0 ms graph + 596.5 ms eval).
Full-attention layers are 1.13× more expensive per layer than sliding (803.8 ms vs 709.8 ms).
Per-projection timing NOT available — cannot determine which matmul dominates the 74.7% eval time.
T2 contiguity hypothesis UNTESTED due to external array dtype mismatch.
All 1180 model tensors mapped-no-copy at load. No application-level weight copies.
Physical residency unresolved: page-fault sampling disabled, per-layer RSS series invalid.
KV cache copies only for full-attention layers (16 KB/step × 8 layers = 128 KB total per decode step).

authorization_detail.layout_qualification: NOT AUTHORIZED — per-projection timing unavailable; T2 probe blocked by dtype mismatch
authorization_detail.kv_optimization: NOT AUTHORIZED — KV copy is 128 KB/step, overshadowed by 596.5 ms evaluation
authorization_detail.graph_sync_optimization: NOT AUTHORIZED — graph construction is 16.2% of wall time; eval dominates
authorization_detail.residency_optimization: NOT AUTHORIZED — page-fault sampling disabled; per-layer RSS series invalid; physical residency unresolved
authorization_detail.mlx_kernel_path_investigation: AUTHORIZED — eval dominates at 74.7% of decode wall time; per-projection attribution is the prerequisite
authorization_detail.next_mission: Build a non-perturbing three-level projection attribution system: (1) per-projection graph-build timing via Instant around each quantized_matmul call, labeled projection_graph_build_us; (2) isolated projection execution timing via forced eval+synchronize in a diagnostic microbenchmark or replay harness, labeled isolated_projection_eval_us; (3) integrated GPU kernel attribution via Metal capture, GPU signposts, or MLX backend instrumentation to identify actual kernel execution inside the unchanged full-layer graph, labeled integrated_gpu_duration_us. The third level is the only method that can assign integrated GPU time to individual projections without inserting seven new synchronization barriers that perturb the execution graph.

revision_changes: Fixed per-layer timing units: 725 ms not 0.725 ms (×1000 error).
Replaced raw_trace_digest path with committed path + SHA-256 hash.
Replaced invalid RSS conclusions: per-layer series shows implausible 6.7 GB → 15 MB drop; physical residency marked unresolved.
Removed 'model fits comfortably' — MLX active 13.7 GB on 16 GB machine is close to the envelope.
Replaced next_action with three-level attribution system description (graph-build, isolated eval, integrated GPU).
